notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom grounds into a force out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Jake Cronenworth. Jo Adell out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom walks. Yoán Moncada to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Bryce Johnson out at 2nd. Gavin Sheets out at 1st.
